name: workflow profile registration writes a workflow-profile entry into the profile system registry
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/register-profile.sh" --profile profiles/p.yaml --workflow-stage architect 2>err.txt && grep -q 'workflow_stages:' profiles/p.yaml && grep -q 'architect' profiles/p.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
